
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"products":[{},{},{}]},"path":[]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"lead":{"id":1,"derivedMood":"HAPPY"},"isLeadAvailable":false},"path":["products",0]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
